case_title: TIANNA SIMON VS. 1060 BUSH STREET APARTMENTS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARIA VILLEGAS FILED BY DEFENDANT MOSSER COMPANY DBA 640 CLAY STREET LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF TIANNA SIMON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT 1060 BUSH STREET APARTMENTS LLC IS PRESENT BY FORREST HAYS VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MOSSER COMPANY DBA 640 CLAY STREET LLC IS PRESENT BY MARIA VILLEGAS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMON, TIANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 1060 BUSH STREET APARTMENTS LLC MOSSER COMPANY DBA 640 CLAY STREET LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,300.25 FILED BY SIMON, TIANNA AS TO DEFENDANT 1060 BUSH STREET APARTMENTS LLC MOSSER COMPANY DBA 640 CLAY STREET LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
